project_type: MQL5 Expert Advisor + Python trading system for MetaTrader 5
build_system: MetaTrader 5 MetaEditor (not available in sandbox - use AST/syntax validation only)
test_framework: No automated test framework for MQL5 files in this project
build_command: N/A - MQL5 files are compiled by MetaEditor which is not available
verification_instructions: Verify file compiles syntactically by checking for balanced braces, correct MQL5 function signatures, and proper use of MT5 API functions. Ensure all strategy logic from Python is faithfully translated.
setup_instructions: N/A - no build environment available for MQL5
environment_constraints: No MQL5 compiler available. Validation is limited to reading the file and verifying correctness by inspection. No network dependencies needed.
contribution_requirements: Single self-contained .mq5 file, no external includes beyond Trade\Trade.mqh and Trade\PositionInfo.mqh from MT5 standard library
key_patterns: The existing standalone EA uses CTrade and CPositionInfo from MT5 standard library. Dashboard uses OBJ_LABEL and OBJ_RECTANGLE_LABEL chart objects with NXS_ prefix. Input parameters use 'input' keyword. Indicator handles via iMA(), iATR(), iADX(), iBands(). Manual computation needed for Choppiness Index and Variance Ratio (not built-in).
relevant_files: trailing_stop.py (candle close manager - BE, reversal, candle exit)
directory_structure: Root contains .mq5 EA files, .py Python strategy files, Include/ has .mqh modules for the main EA, tests/ has pytest files, data/ has data files
